task: Find and open the earliest press release.
final_result_response:
I navigated to https://www.instructure.com/, found the Press Releases section at https://www.instructure.com/news/public-relations, browsed through all 16 pages (0–15), and identified the earliest press release on the last page.

**Earliest Press Release:**
- **Title:** Adobe Creative Cloud Integrates with Canvas to Deliver Creativity & Imagination Opportunities
- **Date:** March 10, 2020
- **URL:** https://www.instructure.com/press-release/adobe-creative-cloud-integrates-canvas-deliver-creativity-imagination-opportunities

**Content Summary:** This press release announced a collaboration between Instructure and Adobe to integrate Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Illustrator, Adobe Spark) directly into the Canvas LMS, allowing students and educators to access creative tools within their daily workflow. It streamlined assignment creation, submission, and grading via Canvas SpeedGrader, while promoting digital literacy and creative skills. IT admins could enable the tools via Canvas API and LTI Advantage.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** Find and open the earliest (oldest) press release on the Instructure website. Success means navigating to the press releases section, identifying the earliest one by date, and actually opening it.

**Output Assessment:** The agent found the Press Releases section at /news/public-relations, browsed all 16 pages (0–15), identified the earliest press release as "Adobe Creative Cloud Integrates with Canvas to Deliver Creativity & Imagination Opportunities" (March 10, 2020), clicked it, and confirmed its content including title, date, and main body.

**Evidence:** Step 14 confirms navigation to page 15 (last page). Step 15 shows 7 press releases listed on that page with the March 10, 2020 entry identified as the oldest. Step 17 confirms the actual click and navigation to the press release URL. Step 18 confirms the page content was read with matching title, date, and content summary. All required actions are evidenced.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated to the press releases section, paginated to the last page, identified the earliest press release by date (March 10, 2020), and opened it — all verified through step files showing actual browser navigation and content extraction.
